## v1.3.0

* Fix all SEO related issues raised by Lighthouse, including:
* Adding missing meta tags for description and viewport
* Adding alt attributes to all images
* Improving the structure of the HTML document for better SEO performance

## v1.2.0

* Various type fixing raised by Eslint
* Updated oxlint config file with the newer configuration file generated by oxlint init
* Reinstalled `@sentry/nuxt` to resolve some type issues with Sentry
* Updated all dependencies to their latest versions, which may have included some type fixes and improvements
* Updated github actions file by removing the tag step
* Added @ts-ignore on pinterest domain verification meta tag to resolve type issues with the meta tag attributes
* Removed deprecated `@unhead/addons` dependency and replaced it with the newer `@unhead/bundler` which is compatible with the latest version of unhead and resolves some type issues related to unhead

### Other Type Fixes

Added this line in package JSON in order to resolve unhead to on unique version

```
json
"pnpm": {
    "overrides": {
        "unhead": "^3.1.0"
    }
},
```

## v1.1.0

* Initial release of the project, with basic features and functionality.
